## Read First

Do not disclose vulnerabilities, secrets, exploit details, or private prompt transcripts in this issue. Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting instead:

https://github.com/jeppsontaylor/Jankurai/security/advisories/new

## Question Or Concern

Describe the policy, documentation, hardening idea, or non-sensitive security behavior you want to discuss.

## Relevant Path

List safe public paths, commands, or docs.
